---
title: "`r paste0('Functional Enrichment Report — ', params$project_name)`"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M')`"
params:
  dge_dir: ""
  project_name: "Project"
  organism: "Unknown"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
      smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 4
    theme: cosmo
    self_contained: true
    number_sections: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(data.table)
library(knitr)

has_pdftools  <- requireNamespace("pdftools",  quietly = TRUE)
has_kableExtra <- requireNamespace("kableExtra", quietly = TRUE)

dge_dir      <- params$dge_dir
organism     <- params$organism
project_name <- params$project_name

# ─── Helper functions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

safe_read <- function(path, ...) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) return(NULL)
  tryCatch(data.table::fread(path, fill = TRUE, ...), error = function(e) NULL)
}

filter_sig <- function(df, threshold = 0.05) {
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)
  pcol <- intersect(c("p.adjust","Adjusted.P.value","pvalue","FDR","fdr"), names(df))
  if (length(pcol) == 0) return(df)
  pcol <- pcol[1]
  df[[pcol]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[pcol]]))
  sig <- df[!is.na(df[[pcol]]) & df[[pcol]] < threshold, ]
  if (nrow(sig) == 0) return(NULL)
  sig
}

select_cols <- function(df) {
  prio <- c("ONTOLOGY","Description","term.label","Term",
            "ID","GeneRatio","BgRatio","Count","number_in_list",
            "pvalue","p.adjust","FDR","fdr","Adjusted.P.value",
            "fold_enrichment","plus_minus",
            "Gene_ID_up_num","Gene_ID_down_num","Gene_ID_num",
            "geneID","Gene_ID","summary_up","summary_down")
  avail <- intersect(prio, names(df))
  if (length(avail) < 2) avail <- names(df)[seq_len(min(10, ncol(df)))]
  df[, avail, with = FALSE]
}

make_table <- function(df, filename = NULL, max_rows = 20) {
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) {
    cat("<p><em>No results found</em></p>\n\n")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  display <- select_cols(df)
  shown   <- head(display, max_rows)
  tbl <- knitr::kable(shown, format = "html", escape = FALSE,
                       table.attr = 'class="table table-sm table-striped table-hover" style="font-size:11px;"')
  if (has_kableExtra) {
    tbl <- kableExtra::kable_styling(tbl,
             bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover","condensed","responsive"),
             full_width = FALSE, font_size = 11)
    tbl <- kableExtra::scroll_box(tbl, width = "100%", height = "400px")
  }
  cat(as.character(tbl), "\n\n")
  if (nrow(df) > max_rows)
    cat(sprintf("<p><em>Showing top %d of %d results</em></p>\n\n", max_rows, nrow(df)))
  if (!is.null(filename)) {
    csv_text <- paste(capture.output(write.csv(df, stdout(), row.names = FALSE)), collapse = "\n")
    b64 <- xfun::base64_encode(charToRaw(csv_text))
    cat(sprintf('<p><a href="data:text/csv;base64,%s" download="%s" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">\u2b07 Download CSV (%d rows)</a></p>\n\n',
                b64, filename, nrow(df)))
  }
}

embed_png <- function(path, caption = "", max_width = "700px") {
  if (!file.exists(path)) return(invisible(NULL))
  uri <- xfun::base64_uri(path)
  fname <- basename(path)
  # Base64-encode the original file for download
  dl_b64 <- xfun::base64_encode(readBin(path, "raw", file.info(path)$size))
  dl_mime <- if (grepl("\\.png$", fname, ignore.case = TRUE)) "image/png" else "image/jpeg"
  cat(sprintf('<figure style="margin:10px 0;text-align:center;"><img src="%s" style="max-width:%s;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:4px;padding:2px;" />',
              uri, max_width))
  if (nchar(caption) > 0)
    cat(sprintf('<figcaption style="font-style:italic;color:#666;font-size:0.9em;">%s</figcaption>', caption))
  cat(sprintf('<br/><a href="data:%s;base64,%s" download="%s" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" style="margin-top:4px;">\u2b07 Download %s</a>',
              dl_mime, dl_b64, fname, fname))
  cat('</figure>\n\n')
}

embed_pdf <- function(pdf_path, caption = "", dpi = 48) {
  if (!has_pdftools || !file.exists(pdf_path)) return(invisible(NULL))
  tryCatch({
    tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
    pdftools::pdf_convert(pdf_path, format = "png", pages = 1, dpi = dpi,
                          filenames = tmp, verbose = FALSE)
    fname <- basename(pdf_path)
    # Show rendered PNG preview
    uri <- xfun::base64_uri(tmp)
    # Base64-encode the original PDF for download
    dl_b64 <- xfun::base64_encode(readBin(pdf_path, "raw", file.info(pdf_path)$size))
    cat(sprintf('<figure style="margin:10px 0;text-align:center;"><img src="%s" style="max-width:700px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:4px;padding:2px;" />', uri))
    if (nchar(caption) > 0)
      cat(sprintf('<figcaption style="font-style:italic;color:#666;font-size:0.9em;">%s</figcaption>', caption))
    cat(sprintf('<br/><a href="data:application/pdf;base64,%s" download="%s" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" style="margin-top:4px;">\u2b07 Download PDF</a>',
                dl_b64, fname))
    cat('</figure>\n\n')
    unlink(tmp)
  }, error = function(e) NULL)
}

show_file_set <- function(dir_path, table_pattern, label,
                          plot_dir = NULL, plot_pattern = NULL, dpi = 48) {
  files <- sort(list.files(dir_path, pattern = table_pattern, full.names = TRUE))
  files <- files[!grepl("_err\\.txt$|_aPEAR|_clusters|_similarity|revigo", files)]
  if (length(files) == 0) {
    cat(sprintf("*%s — not available*\n\n", label))
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  for (f in files) {
    df  <- safe_read(f)
    if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) next
    sig <- filter_sig(df)
    n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
    cat(sprintf("\n**%s** — %d significant of %d tested\n\n", basename(f), n_sig, nrow(df)))
    make_table(df, gsub("\\.txt$", ".csv", basename(f)))
  }
  if (!is.null(plot_pattern) && !is.null(plot_dir) && dir.exists(plot_dir)) {
    plots <- sort(list.files(plot_dir, pattern = plot_pattern, full.names = TRUE))
    for (p in head(plots, 3)) {
      ext <- tolower(tools::file_ext(p))
      if (ext == "pdf") embed_pdf(p, basename(p), dpi = dpi)
      else if (ext %in% c("png","jpg","jpeg")) embed_png(p, basename(p))
    }
  }
}

# ─── Discover results ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

cp_dirs <- sort(list.dirs(dge_dir, recursive = FALSE, full.names = TRUE))
cp_dirs <- cp_dirs[grepl("_funct_enrich_clusterProfiler$", cp_dirs)]
comp_names <- gsub("_funct_enrich_clusterProfiler$", "", basename(cp_dirs))

panther_dirs_all <- sort(list.dirs(dge_dir, recursive = FALSE, full.names = TRUE))
panther_dirs_all <- panther_dirs_all[grepl("_funct_enrichment_panther$", panther_dirs_all)]

# Discover enrichr_clusterProfiler flat folder (non-model organism enrichr path)
enrichr_dir <- file.path(dge_dir, "enrichr_clusterProfiler")
has_enrichr <- dir.exists(enrichr_dir) && length(list.files(enrichr_dir, pattern = "\\.txt$")) > 0
if (has_enrichr) {
  enrichr_files_all <- list.files(enrichr_dir, pattern = "\\.txt$", full.names = TRUE)
  enrichr_files_all <- enrichr_files_all[!grepl("_aPEAR|_similarity", enrichr_files_all)]
  # Derive comparison names from enrichr file names
  enrichr_comp_names <- unique(gsub("_(fdr|pval)_0[15].*", "", basename(enrichr_files_all)))
  enrichr_comp_names <- enrichr_comp_names[grepl("^DGE_analysis_comp", enrichr_comp_names)]
  if (length(comp_names) == 0) comp_names <- enrichr_comp_names
}

if (length(comp_names) == 0) {
  comp_names <- unique(gsub("_fdr_0[15].*", "", basename(panther_dirs_all)))
}

comp_labels <- list()
list_comp_file <- file.path(dge_dir, "list_comp.txt")
if (file.exists(list_comp_file)) {
  lc <- readLines(list_comp_file)
  for (line in lc) {
    parts <- trimws(unlist(strsplit(line, ":")))
    if (length(parts) >= 2) {
      comp_num <- gsub("\\D", "", parts[1])
      comp_labels[[paste0("DGE_analysis_comp", comp_num)]] <- trimws(parts[2])
    }
  }
}

network_dir <- file.path(dge_dir, "network_analyses")
has_network  <- dir.exists(network_dir) && length(list.files(network_dir)) > 0
```

```{r custom-css, results='asis'}
cat('<style>
.table { margin-bottom: 5px; }
figure img { box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); }
.btn-outline-primary { margin: 5px 0; }
h1.title { color: #2c3e50; }
h2 { margin-top: 40px; border-bottom: 2px solid #2c3e50; padding-bottom: 8px; }
h3 { margin-top: 25px; color: #34495e; }
h4 { margin-top: 15px; }
.level4 > .tab-content { padding: 10px 0; }
</style>\n')
```

# Overview

```{r overview, results='asis'}
cat(sprintf("- **Project**: %s\n", project_name))
cat(sprintf("- **Organism**: %s\n", gsub("_", " ", organism)))
cat(sprintf("- **Comparisons found**: %d\n", length(comp_names)))
cat(sprintf("- **Report generated**: %s\n\n", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")))

if (file.exists(list_comp_file)) {
  cat("\n**Comparison labels:**\n\n")
  for (line in readLines(list_comp_file)) cat(sprintf("- %s\n", line))
  cat("\n")
}

cat("\n**Analyses detected:**\n\n")
if (length(cp_dirs) > 0) cat("- \u2705 clusterProfiler (ORA)\n")
gsea_found <- length(list.files(cp_dirs, pattern = "GSEA_", recursive = FALSE)) > 0
if (gsea_found)          cat("- \u2705 Gene Set Enrichment Analysis (GSEA)\n")
if (has_enrichr)         cat("- \u2705 clusterProfiler enrichr (custom GO annotation)\n")
if (length(panther_dirs_all) > 0) {
  cat("- \u2705 autoGO / Enrichr\n")
  cat("- \u2705 Panther\n")
}
apear_found <- length(list.files(cp_dirs, pattern = "_aPEAR", recursive = FALSE)) > 0
if (apear_found)         cat("- \u2705 aPEAR pathway clustering\n")
if (has_enrichr) {
  apear_enrichr <- length(list.files(enrichr_dir, pattern = "_aPEAR", recursive = FALSE)) > 0
  if (apear_enrichr) cat("- \u2705 aPEAR pathway clustering (enrichr)\n")
}
if (has_network) {
  cat("- \u2705 Network analyses (WGCNA")
  if (dir.exists(file.path(network_dir, "STRINGdb"))) cat(" + STRINGdb")
  if (dir.exists(file.path(network_dir, "BONOBO")))   cat(" + BONOBO")
  cat(")\n")
}
cat("\n")

# Link to tar.gz archive
targz <- file.path(dge_dir, "funct_enrichment_analyses.tar.gz")
if (file.exists(targz)) {
  targz_size <- round(file.info(targz)$size / 1024 / 1024, 1)
  targz_b64 <- xfun::base64_encode(readBin(targz, "raw", file.info(targz)$size))
  cat(sprintf('
<div class="alert alert-warning" style="margin:20px 0;border-left:5px solid #f0ad4e;padding:15px;border-radius:4px;">
<strong>\u26a0\ufe0f Full results archive</strong><br/>
This report shows <strong>summarised tables and reduced-resolution image previews</strong>.
The original full-quality plots (PDF vector graphics), complete enrichment tables,
KEGG pathway snapshots, aPEAR interactive HTML widgets, and all other raw output files
are available in the compressed archive:<br/><br/>
<a href="data:application/gzip;base64,%s" download="funct_enrichment_analyses.tar.gz"
   class="btn btn-warning" style="color:#fff;">
\u2b07 Download funct_enrichment_analyses.tar.gz (%s MB)</a>
</div>\n\n', targz_b64, targz_size))
} else {
  cat('
<div class="alert alert-info" style="margin:20px 0;border-left:5px solid #5bc0de;padding:15px;border-radius:4px;">
If enrichment result files cannot be found in the DGE directory, they have been compressed in
<code>funct_enrichment_analyses.tar.gz</code>.
</div>\n\n')
}

if (length(comp_names) == 0)
  cat("\n> **No functional enrichment results were found in this directory.**\n\n")
```

```{r main-loop, results='asis'}
for (idx in seq_along(comp_names)) {
  comp   <- comp_names[idx]
  label  <- if (!is.null(comp_labels[[comp]])) comp_labels[[comp]] else comp
  cp_dir <- cp_dirs[idx]  # may be NA if only panther exists

  comp_num <- gsub("\\D", "", comp)
  cat(sprintf("\n\n# Comparison %s {.tabset .tabset-pills}\n\n", comp_num))

  # ── clusterProfiler ORA ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (!is.na(cp_dir) && dir.exists(cp_dir)) {

    cat("\n## ORA (clusterProfiler) {.tabset}\n\n")

    # ── GO ──
    cat("\n### Gene Ontology {.tabset}\n\n")

    for (ont in c("BP", "MF", "CC")) {
      ont_label <- c(BP = "Biological Process", MF = "Molecular Function",
                     CC = "Cellular Component")[[ont]]
      cat(sprintf("\n#### GO %s\n\n", ont_label))

      # Table
      tbl_files <- list.files(cp_dir,
                              pattern = sprintf("GO_overrepresentation_test_%s_.*\\.txt$", ont),
                              full.names = TRUE)
      tbl_files <- tbl_files[!grepl("_err\\.txt$|_aPEAR|_clusters", tbl_files)]
      if (length(tbl_files) > 0) {
        df  <- safe_read(tbl_files[1])
        sig <- filter_sig(df)
        n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
        cat(sprintf("**%d** significant GO %s terms (adjusted p < 0.05)\n\n", n_sig, ont))
          make_table(df, sprintf("%s_GO_%s_ORA.csv", comp, ont))
      } else {
        cat("*Not available*\n\n")
      }

      # Dotplot
      go_figs <- file.path(cp_dir, "go_figs")
      if (dir.exists(go_figs)) {
        dplot <- list.files(go_figs,
                   pattern = sprintf("overrepresentation_test_%s_.*_dotplot\\.pdf$", ont),
                   full.names = TRUE)
        if (length(dplot) > 0) embed_pdf(dplot[1], sprintf("GO %s — Dotplot", ont))

        bplot <- list.files(go_figs,
                   pattern = sprintf("overrepresentation_test_%s_.*_barplot\\.pdf$", ont),
                   full.names = TRUE)
        if (length(bplot) > 0) embed_pdf(bplot[1], sprintf("GO %s — Barplot", ont))
      }
    }

    # GO ALL (combined)
    cat("\n#### GO ALL (combined)\n\n")
    go_all <- list.files(cp_dir,
                pattern = "^GO_overrepresentation_test_.*\\.txt$",
                full.names = TRUE)
    go_all <- go_all[grepl("^GO_overrepresentation_test_[A-Z]+_(?!BP|MF|CC).*\\.txt$", basename(go_all), perl = TRUE)]
    # Fallback: the ones without BP/MF/CC suffix
    if (length(go_all) == 0)
      go_all <- list.files(cp_dir,
                  pattern = "^GO_overrepresentation_test_[^B][^P].*\\.txt$",
                  full.names = TRUE)
    go_all <- go_all[!grepl("_err\\.txt$|_BP_|_MF_|_CC_|_aPEAR|_clusters", go_all)]
    if (length(go_all) > 0) {
      df  <- safe_read(go_all[1])
      sig <- filter_sig(df)
      n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
      cat(sprintf("**%d** significant GO terms (combined, adjusted p < 0.05)\n\n", n_sig))
        make_table(df, sprintf("%s_GO_ALL_ORA.csv", comp))
    } else {
      cat("*Not available*\n\n")
    }

    # ── KEGG ──
    cat("\n### KEGG {.tabset}\n\n")

    cat("\n#### KEGG Enrichment\n\n")
    kegg_files <- list.files(cp_dir, pattern = "^KEGG_enrich_.*\\.txt$", full.names = TRUE)
    kegg_files <- kegg_files[!grepl("_err\\.txt$|_aPEAR|_clusters", kegg_files)]
    if (length(kegg_files) > 0) {
      df  <- safe_read(kegg_files[1])
      sig <- filter_sig(df)
      n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
      cat(sprintf("**%d** significant KEGG pathways\n\n", n_sig))
        make_table(df, sprintf("%s_KEGG_ORA.csv", comp))
    } else {
      cat("*Not available*\n\n")
    }
    # KEGG pathway snapshots
    kegg_snap <- file.path(cp_dir, "kegg_paths_snapshots")
    if (dir.exists(kegg_snap)) {
      kpngs <- list.files(kegg_snap, pattern = "\\.png$", full.names = TRUE)
      kpdfs <- list.files(kegg_snap, pattern = "\\.(pdf|PDF)$", full.names = TRUE)
      for (p in head(kpngs, 5)) embed_png(p, basename(p))
      for (p in head(kpdfs, 3)) embed_pdf(p, basename(p))
      if (length(kpngs) + length(kpdfs) > 8)
        cat(sprintf("*...and %d more pathway images (available in archive)*\n\n",
                    length(kpngs) + length(kpdfs) - 8))
    }

    # KEGG barplot/dotplot
    kegg_figs <- file.path(cp_dir, "kegg_paths_snapshots")
    if (dir.exists(kegg_figs)) {
      kbar <- list.files(kegg_figs, pattern = "KEGG.*barplot", full.names = TRUE)
      kdot <- list.files(kegg_figs, pattern = "KEGG.*dotplot", full.names = TRUE)
      for (p in head(kbar, 1)) embed_pdf(p, "KEGG — Barplot")
      for (p in head(kdot, 1)) embed_pdf(p, "KEGG — Dotplot")
    }

    cat("\n#### KEGG Modules\n\n")
    mkegg <- list.files(cp_dir, pattern = "^MKEGG_.*\\.txt$", full.names = TRUE)
    mkegg <- mkegg[!grepl("_err\\.txt$|_aPEAR|_clusters|GSEA", mkegg)]
    if (length(mkegg) > 0) {
      df <- safe_read(mkegg[1]); sig <- filter_sig(df)
      n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
      cat(sprintf("**%d** significant KEGG modules\n\n", n_sig))
      make_table(df, sprintf("%s_MKEGG_ORA.csv", comp))
    } else cat("*Not available*\n\n")

    # ── Reactome ──
    cat("\n### Reactome\n\n")
    react_files <- list.files(cp_dir, pattern = "^REACT_[^G].*\\.txt$", full.names = TRUE)
    react_files <- react_files[!grepl("_err\\.txt$|_aPEAR|_clusters|GSEA", react_files)]
    if (length(react_files) > 0) {
      df  <- safe_read(react_files[1])
      sig <- filter_sig(df)
      n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
      cat(sprintf("**%d** significant Reactome pathways\n\n", n_sig))
        make_table(df, sprintf("%s_Reactome_ORA.csv", comp))
    } else {
      cat("*Not available*\n\n")
    }
    react_snap <- file.path(cp_dir, "reactome_paths_snapshots")
    if (dir.exists(react_snap)) {
      rpdfs <- list.files(react_snap, pattern = "\\.pdf$", full.names = TRUE)
      rpdfs <- rpdfs[!grepl("_err", rpdfs)]
      for (p in head(rpdfs, 3)) embed_pdf(p, basename(p))
      if (length(rpdfs) > 3)
        cat(sprintf("*...and %d more Reactome pathway figures in archive*\n\n",
                    length(rpdfs) - 3))
    }

    # ── WikiPathways ──
    cat("\n### WikiPathways\n\n")
    wp <- list.files(cp_dir, pattern = "^WP_[^G].*\\.txt$", full.names = TRUE)
    wp <- wp[!grepl("_err\\.txt$|_aPEAR|_clusters|GSEA", wp)]
    if (length(wp) > 0) {
      df <- safe_read(wp[1]); sig <- filter_sig(df)
      n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
      cat(sprintf("**%d** significant WikiPathways\n\n", n_sig))
      make_table(df, sprintf("%s_WikiPathways_ORA.csv", comp))
    } else cat("*Not available*\n\n")

    # ── Disease Ontology (human) ──
    do_files <- list.files(cp_dir, pattern = "^DO_|^NGC_|^DGN_", full.names = TRUE)
    do_files <- do_files[!grepl("_err\\.txt$|GSEA|_aPEAR", do_files)]
    if (length(do_files) > 0) {
      cat("\n### Disease Ontology {.tabset}\n\n")
      for (f in do_files) {
        bname <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(f))
        cat(sprintf("\n#### %s\n\n", bname))
        df <- safe_read(f); sig <- filter_sig(df)
        n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
        cat(sprintf("**%d** significant terms\n\n", n_sig))
        make_table(df, paste0(bname, ".csv"))
      }
    }

    # ── GSEA ──
    gsea_files <- list.files(cp_dir, pattern = "GSEA_.*\\.txt$", full.names = TRUE)
    gsea_files <- gsea_files[!grepl("_err\\.txt$|_aPEAR|_clusters|_similarity", gsea_files)]
    if (length(gsea_files) > 0) {
      cat("\n## GSEA {.tabset}\n\n")

      # GO GSEA
      go_gsea <- gsea_files[grepl("^GO_GSEA_", basename(gsea_files))]
      if (length(go_gsea) > 0) {
        cat("\n### GO GSEA {.tabset}\n\n")
        # Try to show one per ont+method combination
        go_gsea_bp <- go_gsea[grepl("_BP\\.", basename(go_gsea))]
        go_gsea_mf <- go_gsea[grepl("_MF\\.", basename(go_gsea))]
        go_gsea_cc <- go_gsea[grepl("_CC\\.", basename(go_gsea))]
        go_gsea_all <- go_gsea[!grepl("_BP\\.|_MF\\.|_CC\\.", basename(go_gsea))]

        for (g_set in list(
            list(files = go_gsea_bp,  label = "GO BP GSEA"),
            list(files = go_gsea_mf,  label = "GO MF GSEA"),
            list(files = go_gsea_cc,  label = "GO CC GSEA"),
            list(files = go_gsea_all, label = "GO ALL GSEA")
        )) {
          if (length(g_set$files) > 0) {
            cat(sprintf("\n#### %s\n\n", g_set$label))
            for (f in head(g_set$files, 2)) {
              df <- safe_read(f); sig <- filter_sig(df)
              n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
              cat(sprintf("**%s** — %d significant\n\n", basename(f), n_sig))
              make_table(df, gsub("\\.txt$", ".csv", basename(f)))
            }
            # Ridgeplot / dotplot if available
            go_figs <- file.path(cp_dir, "go_figs")
            if (dir.exists(go_figs)) {
              ridge <- list.files(go_figs, pattern = sprintf("GSEA.*%s.*ridgeplot", gsub(" .*","",g_set$label)),
                                  full.names = TRUE)
              if (length(ridge) > 0) embed_pdf(ridge[1], sprintf("%s — Ridgeplot", g_set$label))
              dot <- list.files(go_figs, pattern = sprintf("GSEA.*%s.*dotplot", gsub(" .*","",g_set$label)),
                                full.names = TRUE)
              if (length(dot) > 0) embed_pdf(dot[1], sprintf("%s — Dotplot", g_set$label))
            }
          }
        }
      }

      # KEGG GSEA
      kegg_gsea <- gsea_files[grepl("^KEGG_GSEA_|^KEGG_DOSE_", basename(gsea_files))]
      if (length(kegg_gsea) > 0) {
        cat("\n### KEGG GSEA\n\n")
        for (f in head(kegg_gsea, 2)) {
          df <- safe_read(f); sig <- filter_sig(df)
          n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
          cat(sprintf("**%s** — %d significant\n\n", basename(f), n_sig))
          make_table(df, gsub("\\.txt$", ".csv", basename(f)))
        }
      }

      # MKEGG GSEA
      mkegg_gsea <- gsea_files[grepl("^MKEGG_GSEA_", basename(gsea_files))]
      if (length(mkegg_gsea) > 0) {
        cat("\n### KEGG Module GSEA\n\n")
        for (f in head(mkegg_gsea, 2)) {
          df <- safe_read(f); sig <- filter_sig(df)
          n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
          cat(sprintf("**%s** — %d significant\n\n", basename(f), n_sig))
          make_table(df, gsub("\\.txt$", ".csv", basename(f)))
        }
      }

      # WikiPathways GSEA
      wp_gsea <- gsea_files[grepl("^WP_GSEA_", basename(gsea_files))]
      if (length(wp_gsea) > 0) {
        cat("\n### WikiPathways GSEA\n\n")
        for (f in head(wp_gsea, 2)) {
          df <- safe_read(f); sig <- filter_sig(df)
          n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
          cat(sprintf("**%s** — %d significant\n\n", basename(f), n_sig))
          make_table(df, gsub("\\.txt$", ".csv", basename(f)))
        }
      }

      # Reactome GSEA
      react_gsea <- gsea_files[grepl("^REACT_GSEA_", basename(gsea_files))]
      if (length(react_gsea) > 0) {
        cat("\n### Reactome GSEA\n\n")
        for (f in head(react_gsea, 2)) {
          df <- safe_read(f); sig <- filter_sig(df)
          n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
          cat(sprintf("**%s** — %d significant\n\n", basename(f), n_sig))
          make_table(df, gsub("\\.txt$", ".csv", basename(f)))
        }
      }

      # DO / NCG / DGN GSEA
      dis_gsea <- gsea_files[grepl("^DO_GSEA_|^NCG_GSEA_|^DGN_GSEA_", basename(gsea_files))]
      if (length(dis_gsea) > 0) {
        cat("\n### Disease Ontology GSEA\n\n")
        for (f in head(dis_gsea, 4)) {
          df <- safe_read(f); sig <- filter_sig(df)
          n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
          cat(sprintf("**%s** — %d significant\n\n", basename(f), n_sig))
          make_table(df, gsub("\\.txt$", ".csv", basename(f)))
        }
      }
    }

    # ── aPEAR ──
    apear_files <- list.files(cp_dir, pattern = "_aPEAR_clusters\\.txt$", full.names = TRUE)
    if (length(apear_files) > 0) {
      cat("\n## aPEAR Pathway Clusters\n\n")
      cat("Pathway clusters identified by the aPEAR algorithm, grouping similar enriched terms:\n\n")
      for (f in head(apear_files, 6)) {
        bname <- basename(f)
        df <- safe_read(f)
        if (!is.null(df) && nrow(df) > 0) {
          cat(sprintf("\n**%s** — %d clusters\n\n", bname, length(unique(df$Cluster))))
          make_table(df, gsub("\\.txt$", ".csv", bname), max_rows = 30)
        }
      }
      apear_pdfs <- list.files(cp_dir, pattern = "_aPEAR\\.pdf$", full.names = TRUE)
      for (p in head(apear_pdfs, 3)) embed_pdf(p, basename(p))
    }

  } else if (has_enrichr) {
    # Enrichr results from non-model organism path (flat folder)
    cat("\n## Enrichr (custom GO annotation) {.tabset}\n\n")

    # Discover DEG sets for this comparison (e.g. fdr_05, fdr_05_logneg, fdr_05_logpos, pval_05, ...)
    all_enrichr_txt <- list.files(enrichr_dir, pattern = "\\.txt$", full.names = TRUE)
    all_enrichr_txt <- all_enrichr_txt[!grepl("_aPEAR|_similarity", all_enrichr_txt)]
    # Extract DEG set labels from file names: everything between comp_ and _Gene_IDs_functional_
    deg_sets <- unique(gsub("^.*?_(fdr_|pval_)", "\\1",
                   gsub("_Gene_IDs_functional_clusterProfiler_enrichr_.*", "", basename(all_enrichr_txt))))
    deg_sets <- deg_sets[grepl("^(fdr|pval)_", deg_sets)]
    deg_sets <- sort(unique(deg_sets))

    # Create readable labels
    deg_label <- function(s) {
      parts <- c()
      if (grepl("fdr", s))  parts <- c(parts, "FDR < 0.05")
      if (grepl("pval", s)) parts <- c(parts, "p-value < 0.05")
      if (grepl("logpos", s)) parts <- c(parts, "Up-regulated")
      else if (grepl("logneg", s)) parts <- c(parts, "Down-regulated")
      else parts <- c(parts, "All DEGs")
      paste(parts, collapse = " — ")
    }

    for (deg_set in deg_sets) {
      cat(sprintf("\n### %s {.tabset}\n\n", deg_label(deg_set)))

      for (ont in c("BP", "MF", "CC")) {
        ont_label <- c(BP = "Biological Process", MF = "Molecular Function",
                       CC = "Cellular Component")[[ont]]
        cat(sprintf("\n#### GO %s {.tabset}\n\n", ont_label))

        # Match files for this DEG set + ontology, only primary results (_1.txt)
        set_pattern <- sprintf("^%s_%s_Gene_IDs_functional_clusterProfiler_enrichr_%s_",
                               comp, deg_set, ont)
        ont_files <- list.files(enrichr_dir, pattern = set_pattern, full.names = TRUE)
        ont_files <- ont_files[grepl("\\.txt$", ont_files)]
        ont_files <- ont_files[!grepl("_aPEAR|_similarity", ont_files)]
        # Keep only primary (_1) results, skip secondary (_2)
        ont_files <- ont_files[grepl("_1\\.txt$|_expr_1\\.txt$", ont_files)]

        if (length(ont_files) > 0) {
          for (f in ont_files) {
            df  <- safe_read(f)
            sig <- filter_sig(df)
            n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
            bg_label <- if (grepl("_expr_1\\.txt$", f)) "Expressed genes background" else "Whole annotation background"
            cat(sprintf("\n##### %s\n\n", bg_label))
            cat(sprintf("**%d** significant GO %s terms (adjusted p < 0.05)\n\n", n_sig, ont))
              make_table(df, sprintf("%s_%s_enrichr_GO_%s_%s.csv", comp, deg_set, ont, bg_label))
          }

          # aPEAR plots for this DEG set + ontology
          apear_pattern <- sprintf("^%s_%s_.*enrichr_%s_.*_aPEAR\\.pdf$", comp, deg_set, ont)
          apear_pdfs <- list.files(enrichr_dir, pattern = apear_pattern, full.names = TRUE)
          for (p in head(apear_pdfs, 2)) embed_pdf(p, basename(p))

          # aPEAR cluster tables
          apear_cl_pattern <- sprintf("^%s_%s_.*enrichr_%s_.*_aPEAR_clusters\\.txt$", comp, deg_set, ont)
          apear_clusters <- list.files(enrichr_dir, pattern = apear_cl_pattern, full.names = TRUE)
          for (f in head(apear_clusters, 2)) {
            df <- safe_read(f)
            if (!is.null(df) && nrow(df) > 0) {
              cat(sprintf("\n**aPEAR clusters** — %d clusters\n\n", length(unique(df$Cluster))))
              make_table(df, gsub("\\.txt$", ".csv", basename(f)), max_rows = 20)
            }
          }
        } else {
          cat("*Not available*\n\n")
        }
      }

      # --- KEGG Orthology tab ---
      cat("\n#### KEGG Orthology {.tabset}\n\n")
      kegg_pattern <- sprintf("^%s_%s_Gene_IDs_functional_clusterProfiler_enrichr_KEGG_",
                               comp, deg_set)
      kegg_files <- list.files(enrichr_dir, pattern = kegg_pattern, full.names = TRUE)
      kegg_files <- kegg_files[grepl("\\.txt$", kegg_files)]
      kegg_files <- kegg_files[!grepl("_aPEAR|_similarity", kegg_files)]
      kegg_files <- kegg_files[grepl("_1\\.txt$|_expr_1\\.txt$", kegg_files)]

      if (length(kegg_files) > 0) {
        for (f in kegg_files) {
          df  <- safe_read(f)
          sig <- filter_sig(df)
          n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
          bg_label <- if (grepl("_expr_1\\.txt$", f)) "Expressed genes background" else "Whole annotation background"
          cat(sprintf("\n##### %s\n\n", bg_label))
          cat(sprintf("**%d** significant KEGG terms (adjusted p < 0.05)\n\n", n_sig))
            make_table(df, sprintf("%s_%s_enrichr_KEGG_%s.csv", comp, deg_set, bg_label))
        }
        kegg_apear <- list.files(enrichr_dir,
                     pattern = sprintf("^%s_%s_.*enrichr_KEGG_.*_aPEAR\\.pdf$", comp, deg_set),
                     full.names = TRUE)
        for (p in head(kegg_apear, 2)) embed_pdf(p, basename(p))
      } else {
        cat("*Not available*\n\n")
      }
    }
  } else {
    cat("\n*clusterProfiler results not found for this comparison*\n\n")
  }

  # ── autoGO / Enrichr ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  pant_dirs <- panther_dirs_all[grepl(paste0("^", comp, "_"), basename(panther_dirs_all))]
  if (length(pant_dirs) > 0) {
    cat("\n## autoGO & Panther {.tabset}\n\n")

    for (pd in pant_dirs) {
      pd_label <- basename(pd)
      # Determine if this is all DEGs, up, or down
      if (grepl("logpos", pd_label)) pd_label_nice <- "Up-regulated DEGs"
      else if (grepl("logneg", pd_label)) pd_label_nice <- "Down-regulated DEGs"
      else pd_label_nice <- "All DEGs (FDR < 0.05)"

      cat(sprintf("\n### %s {.tabset}\n\n", pd_label_nice))

      # autoGO results
      autogo_dirs <- list.dirs(pd, recursive = FALSE, full.names = TRUE)
      autogo_dirs <- autogo_dirs[grepl("_autoGO$", autogo_dirs)]
      if (length(autogo_dirs) > 0) {
        cat("\n#### autoGO / Enrichr\n\n")
        for (agd in autogo_dirs) {
          # Show barplots (PNGs)
          bplots <- list.files(agd, pattern = "_barplot\\.png$", full.names = TRUE)
          for (p in head(bplots, 4)) embed_png(p, basename(p), max_width = "600px")

          # Show top enrichment table
          tsvs <- list.files(agd, pattern = "\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)
          for (f in head(tsvs, 3)) {
            df <- safe_read(f); sig <- filter_sig(df)
            n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
            cat(sprintf("\n**%s** — %d significant terms\n\n", basename(f), n_sig))
            make_table(df, gsub("\\.tsv$", ".csv", basename(f)), max_rows = 15)
          }
          if (length(bplots) > 4)
            cat(sprintf("*...and %d more autoGO plots in the archive*\n\n", length(bplots) - 4))
        }
      }

      # Panther results
      panther_files <- list.files(pd, pattern = "^enriched_.*_panther\\.txt$", full.names = TRUE)
      panther_files <- panther_files[!grepl("_err\\.txt$", panther_files)]
      if (length(panther_files) > 0) {
        cat("\n#### Panther enrichment {.tabset}\n\n")

        # Group by test type (fisher/binom) and background (whole/expr)
        for (test_type in c("fisher_whole_back", "fisher_expr_back",
                            "binom_whole_back", "binom_expr_back")) {
          pf <- panther_files[grepl(test_type, panther_files)]
          if (length(pf) == 0) next

          test_label <- gsub("_", " ", tools::toTitleCase(gsub("_", " ", test_type)))
          cat(sprintf("\n##### %s\n\n", test_label))

          for (f in head(pf, 5)) {
            df <- safe_read(f)
            if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) next
            sig <- filter_sig(df)
            n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
            cat(sprintf("**%s** — %d significant results\n\n", basename(f), n_sig))
            make_table(df, gsub("\\.txt$", ".csv", basename(f)), max_rows = 15)
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }

  # ── REVIGO results ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (!is.na(cp_dir) && dir.exists(cp_dir)) {
    revigo_pdfs <- list.files(cp_dir, pattern = "revigo\\.pdf$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
    if (length(revigo_pdfs) > 0) {
      cat("\n## REVIGO Semantic Similarity\n\n")
      cat("REVIGO reduces redundancy among significant GO terms by clustering semantically similar terms:\n\n")
      for (p in head(revigo_pdfs, 4)) embed_pdf(p, basename(p), dpi = 72)
      if (length(revigo_pdfs) > 4)
        cat(sprintf("*...and %d more REVIGO visualisations in the archive*\n\n", length(revigo_pdfs) - 4))
    }
  }

  cat("\n\n---\n\n")
}
```


```{r network, results='asis'}
if (has_network) {
  cat("\n\n# Network Analyses {.tabset}\n\n")

  wgcna_dir  <- file.path(network_dir, "WGCNA")
  string_dir <- file.path(network_dir, "STRINGdb")
  bonobo_dir <- file.path(network_dir, "BONOBO")

  has_wgcna  <- dir.exists(wgcna_dir) && length(list.files(wgcna_dir)) > 0
  has_string <- dir.exists(string_dir) && length(list.files(string_dir)) > 0
  has_bonobo <- dir.exists(bonobo_dir) && length(list.files(bonobo_dir, recursive = TRUE)) > 0

  # ── WGCNA ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (has_wgcna) {
    cat("\n## WGCNA {.tabset}\n\n")
    cat("Weighted Gene Co-expression Network Analysis — module detection via `blockwiseModules()`:\n\n")

    # Module-condition heatmap (PNG)
    heatmaps <- list.files(wgcna_dir, pattern = "WGCNA_module_type_.*\\.png$", full.names = TRUE)
    for (p in heatmaps) embed_png(p, gsub("WGCNA_module_type_|\\.png$", "", basename(p)))

    # Hub genes
    hub_files <- list.files(wgcna_dir, pattern = "WGCNA_top10_hub_genes_", full.names = TRUE)
    if (length(hub_files) > 0) {
      cat("\n### Hub Genes\n\n")
      cat("Top 10 hub genes per module ranked by intramodular connectivity (kWithin):\n\n")
      for (f in hub_files) {
        df <- safe_read(f)
        if (!is.null(df) && nrow(df) > 0) {
          cat(sprintf("\n**%s**\n\n", gsub("WGCNA_top10_hub_genes_|\\.txt$", "", basename(f))))
          make_table(df, gsub("\\.txt$", ".csv", basename(f)), max_rows = 30)
        }
      }
    }

    # Module assignments
    mod_files <- list.files(wgcna_dir, pattern = "WGCNA_all_modules_", full.names = TRUE)
    if (length(mod_files) > 0) {
      cat("\n### Module Assignments\n\n")
      for (f in mod_files) {
        df <- safe_read(f)
        if (!is.null(df) && nrow(df) > 0) {
          n_mods <- length(unique(df$clusters))
          cat(sprintf("**%s** — %d modules, %d genes\n\n", basename(f), n_mods, nrow(df)))
          make_table(df, gsub("\\.txt$", ".csv", basename(f)), max_rows = 20)
        }
      }
    }

    # Module-trait correlation
    cor_files <- list.files(wgcna_dir, pattern = "WGCNA_module_trait_cor_", full.names = TRUE)
    if (length(cor_files) > 0) {
      cat("\n### Module-Trait Correlation\n\n")
      for (f in cor_files) {
        df <- safe_read(f)
        if (!is.null(df) && nrow(df) > 0) {
          cat(sprintf("**%s**\n\n", basename(f)))
          make_table(df, gsub("\\.txt$", ".csv", basename(f)), max_rows = 30)
        }
      }
    }

    # Dendrograms / other PDFs
    wgcna_pdfs <- list.files(wgcna_dir, pattern = "\\.pdf$", full.names = TRUE)
    wgcna_pdfs <- head(wgcna_pdfs[!grepl("blockwiseModules", wgcna_pdfs)], 5)
    if (length(wgcna_pdfs) > 0) {
      cat("\n### WGCNA Plots\n\n")
      for (p in wgcna_pdfs) embed_pdf(p, basename(p))
    }
  }

  # ── STRINGdb ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (has_string) {
    cat("\n## STRINGdb {.tabset}\n\n")
    cat("Protein-protein interaction network analysis via STRINGdb (score threshold ≥ 400):\n\n")

    # PPI enrichment test
    ppi_files <- list.files(string_dir, pattern = "STRINGdb_PPI_enrichment_test_", full.names = TRUE)
    for (f in ppi_files) {
      df <- safe_read(f)
      if (!is.null(df) && nrow(df) > 0) {
        cat(sprintf("**PPI enrichment test** (%s):\n\n", gsub("STRINGdb_PPI_enrichment_test_|\\.txt$", "", basename(f))))
        make_table(df, gsub("\\.txt$", ".csv", basename(f)))
      }
    }

    # Functional enrichment from STRING
    enrich_files <- list.files(string_dir, pattern = "STRINGdb_functional_enrichment_", full.names = TRUE)
    if (length(enrich_files) > 0) {
      cat("\n### Functional Enrichment\n\n")
      for (f in enrich_files) {
        df <- safe_read(f); sig <- filter_sig(df)
        n_sig <- if (!is.null(sig)) nrow(sig) else 0
        cat(sprintf("**%s** — %d significant terms\n\n", basename(f), n_sig))
        make_table(df, gsub("\\.txt$", ".csv", basename(f)))
      }
    }

    # Cluster assignments
    cluster_files <- list.files(string_dir, pattern = "STRINGdb_all_modules_", full.names = TRUE)
    if (length(cluster_files) > 0) {
      cat("\n### Network Clusters\n\n")
      for (f in cluster_files) {
        df <- safe_read(f)
        if (!is.null(df) && nrow(df) > 0) {
          cat(sprintf("**%s** — %d clusters\n\n", basename(f), length(unique(df$clusters))))
          make_table(df, gsub("\\.txt$", ".csv", basename(f)), max_rows = 20)
        }
      }
    }

    # Network plots
    string_pdfs <- list.files(string_dir, pattern = "\\.pdf$", full.names = TRUE)
    if (length(string_pdfs) > 0) {
      cat("\n### Network Plots\n\n")
      for (p in head(string_pdfs, 5)) embed_pdf(p, basename(p))
      if (length(string_pdfs) > 5)
        cat(sprintf("*...and %d more network plots in the archive*\n\n", length(string_pdfs) - 5))
    }
  }

  # ── BONOBO ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (has_bonobo) {
    cat("\n## BONOBO\n\n")
    cat("Bayesian Optimized Networks (BONOBO) via netZooPy — regulatory network inference:\n\n")
    bonobo_files <- list.files(bonobo_dir, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
    if (length(bonobo_files) > 0) {
      for (f in head(bonobo_files, 5)) {
        df <- safe_read(f)
        if (!is.null(df) && nrow(df) > 0) {
          cat(sprintf("**%s** — %d rows\n\n", basename(f), nrow(df)))
          make_table(df, basename(f), max_rows = 15)
        }
      }
    } else {
      cat("*BONOBO output files not found.*\n\n")
    }
  }

  if (!has_wgcna && !has_string && !has_bonobo) {
    cat("*Network analyses were requested but no output files were found.*\n\n")
  }
}
```

# File Inventory

```{r inventory, results='asis'}
cat("Complete listing of functional enrichment files found in this analysis:\n\n")
cat('<div style="max-height:400px;overflow-y:auto;background:#f8f9fa;padding:10px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-family:monospace;">\n')

# clusterProfiler
for (d in cp_dirs) {
  cat(sprintf("<strong>%s/</strong><br>\n", basename(d)))
  ff <- list.files(d, recursive = TRUE)
  for (f in ff) cat(sprintf("&nbsp;&nbsp;%s<br>\n", f))
}
# enrichr_clusterProfiler (non-model organism)
if (has_enrichr) {
  cat(sprintf("<strong>%s/</strong><br>\n", "enrichr_clusterProfiler"))
  ff <- list.files(enrichr_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  for (f in ff) cat(sprintf("&nbsp;&nbsp;%s<br>\n", f))
}
# panther/autoGO
for (d in panther_dirs_all) {
  cat(sprintf("<strong>%s/</strong><br>\n", basename(d)))
  ff <- list.files(d, recursive = TRUE)
  for (f in ff) cat(sprintf("&nbsp;&nbsp;%s<br>\n", f))
}
# network
if (has_network) {
  cat(sprintf("<strong>%s/</strong><br>\n", "network_analyses"))
  ff <- list.files(network_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  for (f in ff) cat(sprintf("&nbsp;&nbsp;%s<br>\n", f))
}
cat('</div>\n\n')

cat("\n\n---\n\n")
cat(sprintf("*Report generated by reanalyzerGSE on %s*\n", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")))
```
